title: Durable-storage status lives in the status bar
summary: Durable local storage now shows as an ambient indicator in the bottom status bar instead of a banner that reappeared on every page load.
highlights: When storage is working, the persistent top banner is gone — its usage shows quietly in the status bar with the other system info
When storage isn't durable yet, you still get the actionable banner plus a warning-toned reminder in the status bar
